creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #6)
The maintainer expressed he will not be able to maintain the ports due to a new family member here https://lists.FreeBSD.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2015-October/100923.html and this is the follow up for bug 204110 passing on maintainership.
